skills.title: Full-Stack Product Development
skills.blurb: From UX to APIs, full-stack products are built to launch quickly, scale reliably, and drive measurable business outcomes.

skills.title: SaaS Product Engineering
skills.blurb: Scalable SaaS platforms combine clean architecture, maintainable code, and a user-first approach to performance and long-term extensibility.

skills.title: Modern Front-End Architecture
skills.blurb: Modern component systems and front-end architecture create consistent UX, faster delivery cycles, and stronger foundations for complex applications.

skills.title: E-commerce Experience Design
skills.blurb: Conversion-focused commerce experiences blend brand storytelling, technical reliability, and frictionless customer journeys across every touchpoint.

skills.title: AI-Enabled Product Implementation
skills.blurb: AI concepts become production-ready features through intelligent workflows and model-driven functionality aligned to real customer value.

skills.title: Technical Leadership & Team Mentorship
skills.blurb: Cross-functional teams move faster with clear technical direction, practical mentorship, and engineering standards that elevate quality and collaboration.
